summary: Phase C P1 testing: Committed player block, Scheduled send toggle, Messages page filter tabs. Fixed backend bug: GET /coach/messages/sent?status=sent|scheduled returned 500 (pre-v21 fallback missing for filter query). All features verified passing after fix.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: /app/backend/routers/coach_messaging.py get_sent_messages() - pre-v21 graceful fallback was missing for status filter query. When status=sent or status=scheduled filter was applied, APIError was raised (column does not exist) but no fallback existed. Added try/except that rebuilds a fresh query without status filter on error. Note: the supabase query builder is mutable by reference, so base_query variable sharing caused fallback to also include the status filter.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase C P1 fully verified. Committed player (fda135a9 = Test Player) shows message-blocked-btn (purple/disabled 'Committed') in sticky bar, open-message-modal-btn absent. Backend returns 403 with institution name. Schedule toggle: clicking opens datetime-local input + button changes to 'Schedule Message'; toggling off hides input and reverts to 'Send Message'. Messages page /coach/messages has 3 filter tabs (messages-filter-all/sent/scheduled) all clickable. Regular messages load correctly under all tabs (graceful fallback active pre-v21). No scheduled messages exist yet (v21 not run). committed-block-close-btn in modal was not directly tested (would require modal to open for committed player which is blocked at sticky bar level).

test_results.committed_block_backend_403: PASS - POST /api/coach/messages/{committed_id} returns 403 with 'committed' in detail + institution name
test_results.committed_block_ui_message_blocked_btn: PASS - message-blocked-btn (purple, disabled) shown in sticky action bar
test_results.committed_block_ui_no_message_modal_btn: PASS - open-message-modal-btn absent for committed player
test_results.schedule_toggle_visible: PASS - schedule-toggle-btn visible in compose modal for non-committed player
test_results.schedule_toggle_on_datetime_input: PASS - schedule-datetime-input appears after toggle ON
test_results.schedule_toggle_on_button_text: PASS - Send button shows 'Schedule Message' when toggle ON
test_results.schedule_toggle_off_hides_input: PASS - datetime input hidden after toggle OFF
test_results.schedule_toggle_off_reverts_button: PASS - Send button reverts to 'Send Message'
test_results.messages_filter_tabs: PASS - All 3 tabs present: messages-filter-all, messages-filter-sent, messages-filter-scheduled

rca_of_bug_fixed: Root cause: get_sent_messages() used query builder chaining without try/except around the filtered query. When v21 migration not run, .eq('status','sent') raises APIError: column coach_messages.status does not exist. The send endpoint had a fallback (strip status/scheduled_at and retry) but GET endpoint did not. Fix: wrapped the status-filtered query in try/except, falling back to unfiltered query on exception. Additional subtlety: query builder object is mutable by reference in supabase-py, so using 'base_query' as fallback reference also inherited the status filter. Fixed by rebuilding a fresh query object in the except block.
